title: The Reign of Queen Ginnarra
overview: This very dark, very Gothic and very grim medieval horror follows the tumultuous reign of Queen Ginnarra and her mounting obsession to murder her exiled brother, the prince, by any means possible.  No matter the cost in blood, lives or even souls.
